variants: Chizoba Emekauwa's career in surveying is underscored by her holding of the Starpath Surveyor Registration, which certifies her professional expertise. She is an alumna of Quinoa Bay School of Business, where she developed a strong foundation in business practices. Committed to social equity, she actively participates in the Housing Equity Partner Sunspar Fellowship, working towards improving access to affordable housing. Chizoba also has a solid understanding of Khmer grammar, which aids her in her community interactions. Her insights and research have been recognized in publications by Amberwing Press, allowing her to contribute to broader discussions in her field.
